Case Study · October 2024

Mubu — Your Wellness Buddy

A gamified wellness app designed to make emotional wellbeing accessible through quick, playful micro-habits. Built in a 24-hour hackathon and awarded 3rd place.

Role

UX / Product Designer

Timeline

24 hours

Format

Hackathon

Tools

Figma

Placeholder — replace with final mockup or Behance export

The Challenge

The hackathon brief asked teams to design a product that could improve mental wellness for everyday users. The challenge wasn't the subject matter — it was the constraint: a fully playable, persuasive prototype in 24 hours that could compete against teams with engineers building real code.

Existing wellness apps are often heavy, lecture-y, or demand long daily commitments. The opportunity was to design something that could slot into a 2-minute gap in someone's day and still feel meaningful.

📌 Placeholder: Add brief, HMW statement, or key research insight

Process

01 — Define

Framing the problem under time pressure

With only 24 hours, I front-loaded the framing. We aligned quickly on a core user: someone who wants to manage stress or low mood but doesn't have the headspace for a structured programme. The north star became: "One small thing, right now, that actually helps."

02 — Concept

Gamification as an engagement hook

Rather than tracking or reporting (which can amplify anxiety), Mubu centres on a companion character that grows and responds as the user completes micro-activities: journaling prompts, breathing exercises, and a quick mood check-in. Progress is visible but gentle — no streaks to break, no failure states.

📌 Placeholder: Add concept sketches or early wireframes

03 — Design & Prototype

Shipping a fully playable prototype

I designed and prototyped all screens in Figma — including the companion interactions, activity flows, and onboarding — within the 24-hour window. The prototype was interactive enough for judges to experience the full core loop without any explanation.

📌 Placeholder: Add final UI screens

Outcomes

3rd

place out of all competing teams

24h

from brief to playable prototype

100%

Figma — no engineering required

The project also demonstrated the value of clear concept framing under pressure: the judges specifically noted the product narrative as a standout strength.

📌 Placeholder: Add judge feedback or link to full Behance case study
